name: Dr. Manoj Pillai
bio: Dr. Manoj Pillai directs the VLSI Architecture Lab where he designs energy-efficient ASICs and FPGA accelerators for deep learning inference at the edge. His group taped out a 7nm accelerator chip for transformer inference that achieves 15 TOPS/W, published at ISSCC. He also works on hardware trojan detection using side-channel analysis, developing a non-invasive method that uses power trace anomalies to detect malicious modifications in third-party IP cores. His lab is part of the MeitY-funded chip design center focusing on indigenous processor architectures.
